ddls:
CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "ref" TEXT /* Reference designation for the component */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment or description of the component */,
  "footprint" TEXT /* Footprint specification for the component */,
  "component_type" TEXT /* Type of component (e.g., capacitor, resistor) */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the component (e.g., capacitance, resistance) */,
  "tolerance" REAL /* Tolerance of the component (e.g., 5%, 10%) */,
  "power_rating" REAL /* Power rating of the component (e.g., watts) */,
  "package_type" TEXT /* Package type of the component (e.g., SMD, through-hole) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "placements" (
  "placement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each placement record */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the component being placed */,
  "design_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the design associated with the placement */,
  "mid_x" REAL /* X-coordinate of the center of the component */,
  "mid_y" REAL /* Y-coordinate of the center of the component */,
  "rotation" INTEGER /* Rotation angle of the component */,
  "layer" TEXT /* Layer of the circuit board (e.g., top, bottom) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the placement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("placement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_placements_design_id FOREIGN KEY ("design_id") REFERENCES designs ("design_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_placements_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_placements_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the component in inventory */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier providing the component */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Current quantity of the component in stock */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Level at which to reorder the component */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time of the last inventory update */,
  "unit_cost" REAL /* Cost per unit of the component */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier company */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for supplier inquiries */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "designs" (
  "design_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each design */,
  "design_name" TEXT /* Name of the design project */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the design */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the design was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time of the last design update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("design_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "design_components" (
  "design_component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each design-component relationship */,
  "design_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the design associated with the component */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the component used in the design */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the component used in the design */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("design_component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_design_components_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_design_components_design_id FOREIGN KEY ("design_id") REFERENCES designs ("design_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "change_logs" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change record */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the component that was changed */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change made */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was logged */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the change */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change made (e.g., update, delete, insert) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_change_logs_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_change_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, designer, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user (e.g., engineering, design) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
